message:
fix: surface real errors from SearchIssues ephemeral fallthrough (bd-w59l)

SearchIssues and GetReadyWork silently swallowed all errors from
searchWisps, falling through to the issues table. This masked real
errors (timeouts, connection failures, corrupt data) by returning
stale/wrong results. Now only MySQL error 1146 (table does not exist)
triggers fallthrough; all other errors are surfaced to the caller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
